testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer. All 29 tests pass as-is.

criteria.criterion: AC1: class implements IContextProvider with id='test-coverage' and kind='test-coverage'
AC2: constructor accepts story and config and retains both
AC3: fetch returns empty chunks when enabled===false
AC4: fetch returns empty chunks when packageDir is empty/undefined
AC6: forwards testDir, maxTokens(default 500), detail(default names-and-counts), scopeToStory(default true), contextFiles
AC7: passes resolvedTestGlobs from resolveTestFilePatterns(config, repoRoot, packageDir)
AC8: returns empty chunks on empty summary
AC9: non-empty summary emits RawChunk with correct kind/scope/role/rawScore/content/tokens
AC10: chunk id is test-coverage:<8-hex-chars> where hex is first 8 of sha256(content)
AC11: on error, logs warn with component='test-coverage' and {storyId, packageDir, error}
AC12: logger data keys are storyId first, packageDir second
AC13: _testCoverageProviderDeps exported and used for testability

reasoning: All 13 acceptance criteria met. Implementation follows project conventions: dependency injection via _deps, proper async patterns (no uncancellable Bun.sleep), structured logging with [stage] prefix, error wrapping with cause, no any in public APIs, correct use of Bun-native APIs. Test file is comprehensive with 29 tests covering all ACs. No test modifications by implementer. Implementation is clean, correct, and ready.
